name: I'm pro se now, can I see AEO documents?
description: **Pro se? Motion court to modify order for AEO access.** Start with demand letter.[4]

mainEntity.name: I'm pro se now, can I see AEO documents?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Pro se? Motion court to modify order for AEO access.** Start with demand letter.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, as pro se plaintiff, you can likely access AEO documents by court motion.** Protective orders typically limit to 'attorneys,' but courts modify for self-represented parties.[4] Key factors: Send refusal-proof letter requesting access first. File motion with declaration explaining trial prep need. Agree to non-publication limits. Courts treat pro se as attorneys for access. Act before discovery cutoff.
